stemHtml: An aircraft is on an approach with flaps in landing position. ATC instructs the pilot to perform a go around, at which point, he/she experiences an left engine failure. How will the aircraft behave when established in a nose up-attitude?

options.a: Bank towards the right, flaps decrease the roll.
options.b: Bank towards the right, flaps increase the roll.
options.c: Bank towards the left, flaps decrease the roll.
options.d: Bank towards the left, flaps increase the roll.
